description.value:
A small golden key.

This is used as the material component for the @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-spells.Item.Zj7546rr9RJOXgk6]{Magnificent Mansion}spell, which cannot be cast unless this component is carried by the caster.

This component can be used for the casting of the Magnificent Mansion spell as many times as you like. It accesses the same pocket dimension every time, regardless of the spellcaster. To access a new pocket dimension with the Magnificent Mansion spell, you will require a new Attuned Key.
